Text.Page:
Greetings, honored .

Although the mad Bandersnatch has been defeated, and Aliss has been freed, Bandersnatch's retainers remain loyal to him, and they still occupy his castle at Wonderholme.

Your service to the Mysterium has already been more than sufficient, Maester Adonis wanted you to be aware that he is offering a further reward for the defeat of Bandersnatch's remaining forces—and Bandersnatch himself, if he somehow survived your earlier encounter with him.

Thank you for dealing with Bandersnatch again.

Maester Adonis asked me to deliver this reward to you, with his compliments, and the gratitude of the Mysterium.
